{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181721E36C80613A569C23A7D1"}"},"total":882},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7325134198813164298","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好，权利，战争，美女，一个不少。杀伐也果断。挺好看的，多更点。很喜欢看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705518858,"group_id":"7282750715187956771","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7WmWb990f5JBSAHc44KIk0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"111637721424","user_name":"爱吃虾仁炒西芹的凌岩"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111637721424","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705262091,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7282750715187956771","book_info":{"abstract":"(争霸，架空，统一，美女) 
王侯将相宁有种乎，一统江东，虎踞徐淮，鲸吞荆楚，成就霸业，称孤道寡，统一南方之地，北上中原，江山一统，马踏山河，北击匈奴，再续汉朝风情！
意外重生于汉末乱世，却成了一方诸侯的亲侄，只可惜自己叔父即将死亡，不得已站了出来，依靠残兵败将立于江东，击败孙策，统一江东六郡，成就霸业。
听说江东有二乔，生的貌美如花，那我得一亲芳泽，看是否如传闻之中一样。
还听闻江东美人步练师，生的国色天香，一颦一笑，勾人心弦，嘿嘿一笑，那我更加不能放过。
那传闻之中的杜夫人，引得关羽都垂涎不已，如今确乖巧的在我怀中。
随着野心越来越大，天下有名的女子都揽于怀中，渐渐的称之为刘贼。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d29b3cc2c4d2bb3baf84e65373908fb5","author":"星星之云","author_id":"","book_id":"7282750715187956771","book_name":"三国：开局称霸江东，收服大小乔","book_short_name":"三国天下霸主","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7282751557731516968","read_count":"35259","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2614129"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"1290","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/63359e17dab8fdc89022977036e25538~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445041&x-signature=PJChluixdHomfW6mfWfHPlYp5Yc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"75978924761","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"524"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181721E36C80613A569C23A7D1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":44655,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":14927},"user_action":{"author":0,"i
